targets.rawSql: SELECT count(*) AS "Observations" FROM observations WHERE observed_on BETWEEN '${start_date}' AND '${end_date}' AND latitude BETWEEN ${min_lat} AND ${max_lat} AND longitude BETWEEN ${min_lon} AND ${max_lon};

SELECT count(DISTINCT o.taxon_id) AS "Species" FROM observations o JOIN taxa t ON o.taxon_id = t.taxon_id WHERE t.rank = 'species' AND o.observed_on BETWEEN '${start_date}' AND '${end_date}' AND o.latitude BETWEEN ${min_lat} AND ${max_lat} AND o.longitude BETWEEN ${min_lon} AND ${max_lon};

SELECT count(DISTINCT observer_id) AS "Participants" FROM observations WHERE observed_on BETWEEN '${start_date}' AND '${end_date}' AND latitude BETWEEN ${min_lat} AND ${max_lat} AND longitude BETWEEN ${min_lon} AND ${max_lon};

SELECT round(100.0 * sum(CASE WHEN quality_grade = 'research' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(count(*), 0), 1) AS "Research %" FROM observations WHERE observed_on BETWEEN '${start_date}' AND '${end_date}' AND latitude BETWEEN ${min_lat} AND ${max_lat} AND longitude BETWEEN ${min_lon} AND ${max_lon};

WITH daily_new AS (SELECT date_trunc('day', min(o.observed_on)) AS first_day FROM observations o JOIN taxa t ON o.taxon_id = t.taxon_id WHERE t.rank = 'species' AND o.observed_on BETWEEN '${start_date}' AND '${end_date}' AND o.latitude BETWEEN ${min_lat} AND ${max_lat} AND o.longitude BETWEEN ${min_lon} AND ${max_lon} GROUP BY o.taxon_id) SELECT first_day AS time, sum(count(*)) OVER (ORDER BY first_day) AS cumulative_species FROM daily_new WHERE first_day IS NOT NULL GROUP BY first_day ORDER BY first_day;

SELECT t.name AS species, count(*) AS observations FROM observations o JOIN taxa t ON o.taxon_id = t.taxon_id WHERE t.rank = 'species' AND o.observed_on BETWEEN '${start_date}' AND '${end_date}' AND o.latitude BETWEEN ${min_lat} AND ${max_lat} AND o.longitude BETWEEN ${min_lon} AND ${max_lon} GROUP BY t.name ORDER BY observations DESC LIMIT 30;

SELECT t.rank, count(*) AS total FROM observations o JOIN taxa t ON o.taxon_id = t.taxon_id WHERE t.rank IS NOT NULL AND o.observed_on BETWEEN '${start_date}' AND '${end_date}' AND o.latitude BETWEEN ${min_lat} AND ${max_lat} AND o.longitude BETWEEN ${min_lon} AND ${max_lon} GROUP BY t.rank ORDER BY total DESC;

SELECT o.latitude, o.longitude, t.name AS species, ob.login AS observer FROM observations o LEFT JOIN taxa t ON o.taxon_id = t.taxon_id LEFT JOIN observers ob ON o.observer_id = ob.observer_id WHERE o.geom IS NOT NULL AND o.observed_on BETWEEN '${start_date}' AND '${end_date}' AND o.latitude BETWEEN ${min_lat} AND ${max_lat} AND o.longitude BETWEEN ${min_lon} AND ${max_lon} LIMIT 5000;

SELECT ob.login, ob.name, count(*) AS observations, count(DISTINCT o.taxon_id) AS species FROM observations o JOIN observers ob ON o.observer_id = ob.observer_id WHERE o.observed_on BETWEEN '${start_date}' AND '${end_date}' AND o.latitude BETWEEN ${min_lat} AND ${max_lat} AND o.longitude BETWEEN ${min_lon} AND ${max_lon} GROUP BY ob.login, ob.name ORDER BY observations DESC LIMIT 30;

SELECT to_char(observed_on, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS day, count(*) AS observations, count(DISTINCT observer_id) AS participants FROM observations WHERE observed_on BETWEEN '${start_date}' AND '${end_date}' AND latitude BETWEEN ${min_lat} AND ${max_lat} AND longitude BETWEEN ${min_lon} AND ${max_lon} GROUP BY observed_on ORDER BY observed_on;

list.name: start_date
list.label: Event Start Date
list.description: Start date of the bioblitz event (YYYY-MM-DD)

list.name: end_date
list.label: Event End Date
list.description: End date of the bioblitz event (YYYY-MM-DD)
